mechanism: Bayesian comparative evidence evaluation where test utility is decomposed into outcome probability and conditional likelihood ratio. Decision-maker assesses preposterior trade-off between expected frequency of confirmation and information gain from outcome, balancing support probability against evidentiary weight to select between competing tests.
distribution: likelihood ratio under hypothesis versus alternative

mechanism: Evaluative impressions act as accessible summary representations. Judgments of distinct dimensions (e.g. risk, benefit) are derived from retrieval of common affective tag, inducing dimensional dependencies. Accessible affective rating serves as heuristic shortcut bypassing analytic decomposition of independent dimensions.

Post-discussion memory distortion from source-monitoring confusion. Witnesses encode both self-generated and conversationally-provided details, then at retrieval assign original-experience status based on perceptual vividness or familiarity cues, collapsing distinct source signals into unified memory report.
distribution: source attribution errors conditional on encoding context

mechanism: Detection bias in pattern recognition tasks where liberal response criterion increases false-positive rate. Activated conceptual knowledge (belief-congruent patterns) lowers threshold for pattern acceptance, producing hits and false alarms in correlated fashion across signal and noise trials.
distribution: signal detection model with criterion shift

mechanism: Emotional arousal drives allocation of helping resources. Vivid individual representation triggers perspective-taking and empathic distress; this emotion-driven response scales helping allocation. Group representation attenuates emotional response despite identical need structure, dissociating affect from normative resources.

Incidental numerical cues gain accessibility when environmentally concurrent with judgment task. Accessible numeric value biases point estimates via priming mechanism, pulling numeric responses toward anchor with shallow processing sufficient to produce effect. Increased salience does not strengthen bias.
distribution: numeric response distribution shifted toward prime
